task_completion.description: The Memorize activity is opened in Sugar OS.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Memorize activity interface is visible on the screen, typically showing a grid for playing or a list for editing.

task_completion.description: The agent navigated to the creation/editing interface to add card pairs.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Create' or 'Edit' tab/view in the Memorize activity is active, showing input fields for pairs of cards.

task_completion.description: The 6 times table multiplication expressions (6x1 through 6x8) are entered as the front of the cards.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text '6x1', '6x2', '6x3', '6x4', '6x5', '6x6', '6x7', and '6x8' are visible in the first column or 'front' side of the card pair input fields.

task_completion.description: The correct products for the 6 times table (6 through 48) are entered as the back of the cards.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The numbers '6', '12', '18', '24', '30', '36', '42', and '48' are visible in the second column or 'back' side of the card pair input fields, matching their respective expressions.

task_completion.description: Exactly 8 card pairs are created for the game.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The creation interface shows exactly 8 rows or pairs of cards, with no extra empty pairs or missing pairs.

task_completion.description: The game is saved with the title '6 Times Table Game'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The title '6 Times Table Game' is visible in the activity toolbar at the top of the screen, or the Sugar Journal shows an entry with this exact title.

integrity.description: The agent used the graphical user interface to create the game.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the mouse cursor interacting with the Memorize GUI, typing into text fields, rather than a terminal window executing scripts to create the game file.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the actual Memorize activity.
integrity.visual_evidence: The distinctive Sugar OS Memorize activity UI is visible, not a generic text editor or a different application.

integrity.description: The agent did not bypass the UI by directly writing to the Sugar Journal datastore via terminal.
integrity.visual_evidence: There should be no terminal windows open showing python scripts or direct file manipulation commands (like writing a JSON/zip file directly to the datastore).

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected journal title is exactly '6 Times Table Game'. The game must contain exactly 8 pairs. The pairs must be the 6 times table: 6x1=6, 6x2=12, 6x3=18, 6x4=24, 6x5=30, 6x6=36, 6x7=42, 6x8=48.
